title: helixanthera ensifolia
intro: Helixanthera ensifolia, also known as the spear-leaved helixanthera or devil's lily, is a flowering plant in the family Loranthaceae. This parasitic plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Helixanthera ensifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, it is prepared into herbal infusions, decoctions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
